# Haram Textile

> Manufacturer and exporter of textile and knitted garments in Pakistan, founded December 19, 2009. Haram Textile is a leading textiles and garments manufacturing exporter with a complete in-house setup spanning knitting, dyeing, sewing, printing, embroidery, and packing.

Haram Textile believes in quality products and is committed to providing quality products by meeting customer requirements through continual improvement at every stage of the manufacturing process. Our main product line is knitwear articles, T-shirts, polo shirts, sweat shirts, basic and fashionable jogging suits, leggings, bike shorts, tops for ladies and girls, underwear, and pants in solid/print, using fabrics including 100% cotton, 95% cotton/5% Lycra, and microfiber with Lycra.

## Products

- [Boys Collection](https://www.haramtextile.com/products?category=boys): Roll Neck Shirts, Jogging Trousers, Sweat Shirts, Polo Shirts, T-Shirts, Hooded Shirts, Pyjama Suits
- [Girls Collection](https://www.haramtextile.com/products?category=girls): Roll Neck Shirts, Jogging Trousers, Sweat Shirts, Polo Shirts, T-Shirts, Hooded Shirts, Pyjama Suits
- [Ladies Collection](https://www.haramtextile.com/products?category=ladies): Roll Neck Shirts, Jogging Trousers, Sweat Shirts, Polo Shirts, T-Shirts, Hooded Shirts, Pyjama Suits
- [Men's Collection](https://www.haramtextile.com/products?category=gents): Roll Neck Shirts, Jogging Trousers, Sweat Shirts, Polo Shirts, T-Shirts, Hooded Shirts, Pyjama Suits

## Certifications

- ISO 9001:2008 (certified by ACS)
- Oeko Tex 100 by AITEX Spain Class II
- BSCI certified

## Contact

- Phone: (+92) 41-8814858

- Email (MD): fareed@haramtextile.com
- Address: 7-km, Millat Chock, West Millat Industrial Estate, Pharang Drainge Dhanola, Faisalabad, Pakistan
- Hours: Mon-Sat 9:30 am - 6:00 pm; Sunday closed

## B2B Inquiries

Haram Textile welcomes B2B wholesale and private-label inquiries from international brands and importers. Use the [Contact page](https://www.haramtextile.com/contact) to request a quote, specifying product category, target quantity, fabric preference, and destination country.
